page-description: Meet Andejecruher — Full Stack Developer (backend-first) focused on Backend Engineering, Frontend Development, SaaS Architecture, REST APIs, AI Agents, Automation and enterprise integrations.
header-subtitle: Full Stack Developer with a backend-first approach across SaaS architecture and integrations; I also deliver product-facing frontend for end-to-end solutions.
hero-title: Backend Engineering for SaaS products with AI and automation
hero-subtitle: I design, build and integrate systems where backend, SaaS architecture and intelligent automation become an operational advantage, connected with product-focused frontend delivery.
executive-summary-p1: I drive end-to-end SaaS products through backend, APIs and enterprise integrations, with a focus on real operations and functional UI delivery.
executive-summary-p2: I work with JavaScript, PHP and Python (Node.js, Laravel, Express, FastAPI and React) to deliver maintainable and scalable solutions.
executive-summary-p3: I combine architecture, automation and applied AI to turn complex needs into clear systems for business and users.
quick-info-specialization-value: SaaS backend, product frontend delivery, workflow automation, AI agents and enterprise integrations
focus-backend-desc: Design and construction of robust REST APIs and business logic with Laravel, Node.js and FastAPI.
focus-saas-desc: Multi-tenant architecture, authentication, authorization, billing and scalability for modern SaaS platforms.
focus-ai-desc: LLM integration, building conversational agents and workflow automation with AI.
focus-messaging-desc: Connection with WhatsApp Business API, Telegram, Instagram and Facebook for multichannel solutions.
focus-devops-desc: Active growth in Docker, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, monitoring and automated deployments.
impact-subtitle: Professional value focused on technical delivery, cross-functional integrations and sustained execution.
impact-platform-desc: Delivery of web applications and APIs connecting product frontend, backend, relational and NoSQL data in coherent architectures.
impact-integrations-desc: Integration of products with WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram and Facebook to centralize operations and multichannel communication.
impact-execution-desc: Technical design driven by quality, maintainability and workflow automation for products in continuous evolution.
impact-growth-desc: Continuous growth in CI/CD, deployment and observability to raise SaaS solutions to a more resilient standard.
journey-subtitle: Progressive evolution of technical focus, from interfaces to architecture and infrastructure.
goal-description: My goal is to lead end-to-end systems where software engineering, applied AI and DevOps practices work together to accelerate business outcomes.
goal-closing-line: I seek to collaborate on SaaS products with technical ambition, long-term vision and measurable impact for clients and teams.
